race.description: Sportsbet Bet With Mates Battlers Bolt Mdn Plate
race.comment: GARRIX (9) led early and was still in the firing line on the turn last start before tiring to finish fifth over the mile at Newcastle. Makes his stable debut for the Hickmott camp and can get off the mark in this suitable assignment. ARAMOSO (2) made progress last time out, finishing in third at the end of 1250m at Morphettville Parks. Finds the maiden win elusive but only needs to hold his form to be right there again. DISCREETLY BLUE (4) finds it hard to break the ice but is knocking on the door. Peak fitness now and doesn't need to improve much to finally get off the mark. ALL TOO TRUE (1) should be at his top now and is one to watch for charging late in the piece. If the pace is hot, he can reel them in.
